prs.title: fixed responsiveness, backdrop and some other changes.
prs.body:
<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Style**
  * Enhanced visual depth with stronger drop-shadows, refined spacing, and improved typography scaling for better responsiveness.
  * Updated header/navigation, hero, countdown timer, and text effects for more polished and consistent mobile/desktop layouts.
* **New Features**
  * Responsive, auto-scrolling sponsor marquee with duration that adapts to viewport size for smoother animations.

<sub>✏️ Tip: You can customize this high-level summary in your review settings.</sub>
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

prs.title: improved icons in footer and learning path
prs.body:
## Description

Improved the UI by enhancing the hover state of icons for better interactivity in footer and adjusted the border-radius of Learning path to achieve a smoother, more polished look

## Type of Change
- [x] New feature

## Related Issue
Closes #41

prs.title: Changes - Cube , added animation to toolTips
prs.body: ## Description Converted the three tooltip badges into rounded “pill” elements (dark semi-transparent background, purple/blue borders, backdrop blur). Also added animation to them. ## Type of Change - [x] New feature ## Related Issue Closes #39

issues.title: GitHub Star Status Not Reflected After Starring the Repo
issues.body: **Describe the bug** When user stars the OWASP nest github repository using their github account, the website does not update the star button to starred. Even after logging into the website, the UI will shows the option to star the repo instead of showing that it is already starred. **To Reproduce** Steps to reproduce the behavior: 1. Go to 'https://nest.owasp.org/' 2. Login with github 3. Click on 'star' 4. Redirects to NEST github. 5. Star the repo **Expected behavior** If a logged in user has already starred the github repo, then the website should show the correct status of the star repo button **Are you going to work on fixing this?** - [x] Yes - [ ] No **Screenshots** then: **Desktop (please complete the following information):** **Additional context** Please let me know if this behavior is wanted and if you’d like me to open a PR for it.
